metadata.explanation: This HTML file (`index.html`) provides the basic structure for the cyberpunk login page. It uses Jinja2 syntax to dynamically set the page title and display error messages passed from the FastAPI backend. The form is designed with fields for 'username' and 'password' and submits to the '/login' endpoint using the POST method. Classes like `login-container`, `glitch`, `sub-title`, `error-message`, `login-form`, `input-group`, `input-label`, `login-button`, and `footer-text` are added for applying specific cyberpunk-themed styling via CSS.
